hero.heading: Odoo ERP, Software & Digital Transformation
hero.text: AimAze Tech Solutions helps UAE and international companies implement Odoo ERP, automate workflows, improve reporting, and build scalable digital systems around real business operations.

services.title: Odoo ERP Implementation
services.text: Module planning, configuration, migration, training and go-live support for CRM, sales, finance, HR, inventory and operations.

services.title: Odoo Customization
services.text: Custom workflows, dashboards, approvals, automated reports and business-specific modules built around your processes.

services.title: CRM & Sales Automation
services.text: Lead management, pipeline stages, follow-ups, quotation workflow and full management visibility.

services.title: Finance Dashboards
services.text: CFO dashboards, receivable tracking, margin reporting, VAT workflows and real-time KPI visibility.

services.title: Custom Software & Websites
services.text: Professional business websites, portals, internal tools and web applications built for growth.

services.title: IT Support & Digital Advisory
services.text: Process review, automation roadmaps, integration planning and long-term technology support.

why.heading: Built for clarity, control and growth.
why.text: Our goal is to make technology simple, useful and measurable for management and operating teams.

points.title: Business-first approach
points.text: We understand finance, controls, operations and management reporting — not only software screens.

points.title: Practical Odoo expertise
points.text: We focus on the right configuration and customization for real workflows, not over-engineering.

points.title: Cost-effective delivery
points.text: Open-source flexibility with professional implementation, training and long-term support.

points.title: Long-term partner
points.text: We stay involved after launch for training, continuous improvements and optimization.

process.title: Discover
process.text: We study your current process, pain points, reports and required controls.

process.title: Design
process.text: We map the right Odoo modules, workflows, roles and dashboards for your needs.

process.title: Implement
process.text: We configure, customize, migrate data and test everything with your users.

process.title: Train & Support
process.text: We train your team and keep improving the system after go-live.

testimonials.name: Ahmed Al Mansoori
testimonials.text: AimAze transformed our operations completely. The Odoo implementation gave us full visibility across sales, finance and inventory in one system.

testimonials.name: Sarah Johnson
testimonials.text: The finance dashboard they built saves our team hours every week. Real-time reporting has changed how we make decisions.

testimonials.name: Khalid Rahman
testimonials.text: Professional team, on-time delivery and excellent support. Our website and CRM integration works perfectly.
